# 00_raw_transcripts — Evidence Archive

This directory contains the original auto-generated captions from Panopto lecture recordings, copied verbatim and renamed to a chronological `L##_YYYY-MM-DD_raw.txt` convention.

**Do not edit, rename, summarise, or overwrite any file in this directory.**  
These are the authoritative source records.

## File Naming Convention

`L{number}_{YYYY-MM-DD}_raw.txt` where the lecture number is chronological (L01 = first lecture of term).
